drills.detail: copied recipient changes envelope, salt and proposal id
self-payment used ordinary timeout and treasury path
field substitution and domain replay rejected
duplicate proposal id reverted without new state
underfunded execution reverted then reconciled after funding
expired action remained dead; fresh envelope produced a new id
clean replay identical; bad lineage rejected
partial RPC failure sent nothing; retry resumed
signer failure recorded and retried exactly
dropped-response restart observed exactly one landed effect
fresh runner restart matched every lifecycle boundary
two keepers produced one queue winner and one benign loser
